title: Model R1 Neo battery ADC for HAL battery capability
description: Discovered while creating project-LICHEN-ev5b.4. R1 Neo facts list VBAT on P0.31/AIN7 with multiplier 1.667, but the Zephyr board target does not yet expose a battery0 device or enable CONFIG_LICHEN_HAS_BATTERY. Decide whether to use voltage-divider or a LICHEN-specific battery measurement shim, add tests/build coverage, and validate readings on hardware.
notes: Completed no-hardware R1 Neo battery ADC modeling. R1 Neo DTS now aliases battery0 to a voltage-divider vbatt node on SAADC channel 7 / NRF_SAADC_AIN7 (P0.31), with output-ohms 100000 and full-ohms 166700 for multiplier 1.667. R1 Neo gateway config enables CONFIG_SENSOR and CONFIG_LICHEN_HAS_BATTERY. HAL contract now requires CONFIG_LICHEN_HAS_BATTERY to depend on SENSOR and VOLTAGE_DIVIDER, and build asserts battery0 is an okay voltage-divider sensor before using Zephyr sensor_sample_fetch_chan(SENSOR_CHAN_VOLTAGE). HAL power snapshots set battery_provider_available and battery_voltage_mv_valid from the sensor voltage; battery_percent remains invalid until a discharge curve exists. Added native_sim/qemu HAL battery ADC emulator scenario. Created and blocked child project-LICHEN-usqf.1 for physical R1 Neo voltage validation. Reviews: initial independent reviews found P2 gaps in battery0 sensor-backed contract and VOLTAGE_DIVIDER dependency; both fixed. Final independent reviews Heisenberg/Noether found no P0/P1/P2 findings; git diff --check passed. EC2 validation on i-05e27e074db786e22, clean worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-r1neo-battery: HAL Twister final command west twister -T lichen/tests/hal -p native_sim -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --integration --outdir twister-out-r1neo-battery-hal-v4 -x=ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-r1neo-battery/lichen ; PASS 6/6 configs, 126 cases, 12 skipped, 0 warnings, 121.66s. Gateway status consumer command west twister -T lichen/tests/gateway_status -p native_sim -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --integration --outdir twister-out-r1neo-battery-gateway-status -x=ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-r1neo-battery/lichen ; PASS 2/2 configs, 12 cases, 0 skipped, 0 warnings, 49.40s. R1 Neo board build command west build -p always -b r1_neo lichen/apps/gateway -d build-r1-neo-gateway-battery-v2 -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-r1neo-battery/lichen ; PASS, FLASH 256504 B / 1 MB (24.46%), RAM 84484 B / 256 KB (32.23%), IDT_LIST 0/32 KB. Generated config includes CONFIG_LICHEN_HAS_BATTERY=y, CONFIG_ADC=y, CONFIG_ADC_NRFX_SAADC=y, CONFIG_SENSOR=y, CONFIG_VOLTAGE_DIVIDER=y. Generated DTS shows battery0 = &vbatt, channel@7 reg 0x7, input-positive 0x8 (NRF_SAADC_AIN7), compatible voltage-divider, io-channels <&adc 0x7>, output-ohms 0x186a0, full-ohms 0x28b2c. Known R1 Neo build warnings: duplicate unit-address warnings for Nordic clock/power and acl/flash-controller, empty drivers__net library, USB_CDC_ACM_LOG_LEVEL forced to LOG_LEVEL_NONE. Physical voltage validation remains blocked in project-LICHEN-usqf.1.
close_reason: Completed no-hardware R1 Neo battery ADC modeling: voltage-divider battery0 on P0.31/AIN7, HAL voltage snapshot, native_sim/qemu ADC-emul tests, R1 Neo gateway build; physical voltage validation blocked in project-LICHEN-usqf.1.
